flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Concord University rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $10.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Concord University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.4k → $22.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Concord University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Concord University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (56.8% → 64.8%).
